title: Cinematic Character Poster From Video Pack AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Character Poster From Video Prompt Pack AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic action-character poster distilled from a video prompt pack, centered on tiny elderly Asian man with white buzz cut, thick black-rimmed glasses, grey cardigan, calm sleepy face in a high-energy genre scene with Premium cinematic urban-fantasy action poster with high-energy martial-arts blocking, believable physical motion, detailed environment texture, dramatic genre polish, and sequence-prompt storytelling compressed into. Subject: tiny elderly Asian man with white buzz cut, thick black-rimmed glasses, grey cardigan, calm sleepy face is the unmistakable lead character, keeping the described face, body scale, clothing cues, expression, and a metal lunchbox like a shield as the fixed hero identity inside the poster. Scene: late-night subway car during a power-flicker storm, wet floor, sparking lights, swaying handrails becomes a dense cinematic battleground with moving silhouettes, physical debris, and the implied action pressure of a longer sequence compressed into one frame. Composition: Single 16:9 key-art poster frame built around he stands calmly at the center aisle while the horde bends around him like a wave; the lead character sits or stands at the visual center while hostile motion bends around them and the background remains readable. Signature Elements: A distinctive unlikely hero, the recognizable a metal lunchbox like a shield, implied shadow enemies formed from light and environment fragments, and a deadpan heroic poster rhythm rather than a literal storyboard. Fixed source details: Lighting Event: one overhead fluorescent strip explodes into white-blue light; Tone: deadpan heroic urban fantasy. Style: Premium cinematic urban-fantasy action poster with high-energy martial-arts blocking, believable physical motion, detailed environment texture, dramatic genre polish, and sequence-prompt storytelling compressed into still key art. Color Palette: Dark city-night neutrals, cold fluorescent blue-white highlights, wet reflective surfaces, muted clothing colors, and small hot sparks or paper fragments as accents. Lighting: Enemy is a horde of shadow commuters made from flickering lights, flying newspapers, and dark rushing shapes. drives the main illumination, with flickering practical lights, rim glow, hard motion shadows, and dramatic contrast that keeps the character silhouette legible. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Create one still image, not a video storyboard;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
